mapper.select: SELECT c.*, m.name as category_name FROM media_content c LEFT JOIN media_category m ON c.category_id = m.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE media_content SET del_flag = '1' WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM media_content WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND del_flag = '0' AND status = '0' ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE media_content SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE media_content SET favorite_count = favorite_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
